description_long: This awning features a rectangular canopy supported by a robust metal frame, designed to provide shade and shelter in urban environments. The canopy appears to be made of a durable, weather-resistant fabric, likely synthetic, stretched tightly over the frame. The support structure consists of horizontal and vertical metal bars, with visible mounting brackets for secure attachment to a building facade. The edge of the canopy is straight and clean, with no decorative trim or valance, emphasizing a modern and functional aesthetic. The color scheme is predominantly dark gray, with some lighter metallic elements visible in the frame. There is no visible branding, signage, or decorative pattern on the canopy, making it suitable for a variety of commercial or residential applications.
description: A modern, rectangular awning with a dark gray fabric canopy and a sturdy metal frame, featuring a straight edge and no visible branding or decoration.
description_view_0: The awning is seen from the side, highlighting the full length of the canopy and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_1: A narrow end-on view, showing the thickness of the canopy and the vertical support bars.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, revealing the underside of the canopy and the attachment points to the wall.
description_view_3: A rear view, focusing on the mounting brackets and the back of the support frame.
attribute_mounting_location: wall-mounted above a window or storefront facade
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with horizontal and vertical metal bars
